name: Venty Case
summary: The Venty Case ensures the safety and security of your Venty vaporiser while on the go.
description: The Venty Case ensures the safety and security of your Venty vaporiser while on the go. With its strong outer shell, your device and cleaning tools will remain protected and organised with the help of straps and pockets. This case is specifically designed for the Venty, Dosing Magazine, and other related accessories. When fully zipped, it effectively conceals odours, providing a discreet and smell-proof experience. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
